pary-ava-√sthā Ā. -tiṣṭhate, to become firm or steady,  Bhag. ;
to fill, pervade (acc.),  MBh.  :
Caus. -sthāpayati, to comfort, encourage,  ib.

results.rendered_html:
paryavasthā 1 P.
1 To set out.
2 To be or exist everywhere.
3 To rely upon.
— Caus. To compose or collect oneself; na paryavasthāpayatyātmānaṃ  V. 1.
